user.title: Wyoming Transcribe server
user.description: Point at the management API (port 8580 by default). The host must be reachable from your browser as well — the UI is embedded as a sidebar panel.

data.host: Host (LAN address of the Docker host)
data.api_token: API token (only if API_TOKEN is set on the server)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the server (check host/port and that port 8580 is exposed).
